meta.title: SOAR In ICS
meta.description:
Peter Lund of Industrial Defender joins Dale to discuss SOAR in ICS.

- Examples of early big wins for SOAR in ICS

- Can you mix and match your SIEM and SOAR from different vendors?

- Partial v Full Automation ... will there always be a person in the loop?

- Does SOAR need to be customized for OT to be of real use in OT?

They finish the conversation with a bit on Industrial Defender's recently announced OT Machine Learning Language.
